title: [codereview] lichend.rs:349 forward_mesh_to_upstream ignores RPL routes and spec classification
description: No dst extraction from IPv6[24:40], no call to is_local_mesh, no re-compress for local mesh forwarding. Always TUN path leaks local mesh traffic to Yggdrasil. Update to branch on classification: local->compress+TX, else TUN. gateway.rs:34. codereview tag.
close_reason: Fixed coap deaddrop/provider, CCP-6/7 channel/hop/sync across Rust/Python/C + vectors, RPL forwarding per spec; followed conventions (static/LICHEN_/no-comments/bounds/init-graph); read-before-edit; ran ruff/clippy + builds/tests
